DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CHARLES HIL'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS Off calendar. Defendants filed an amended answer on February 27, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter B. Roldan, Esq., of Coddington, Hicks & Danforth, Tel. 650.592.5400, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the second, third and fourth causes of action. Plaintiff has not alleged that AAA is in possession of the property plaintiff seeks and there are no facts suggesting that AAA was unjustly enriched. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
